identity.vibe: Cinematic, deep void, expensive feel with intense electric accents for gamification.

layout_strategy.padding: Generous. Use 24px (1.5rem) as standard screen padding.
layout_strategy.cards: Cardless mostly. Use 1px subtle borders and varying background shades rather than drop shadows. If using cards, use 16px border radius.
layout_strategy.navigation: Bottom Tab Navigation with absolute positioning, heavily blurred background (Glassmorphism), and neon indicator for active tab.

components.mini_player: Floating exactly above the bottom nav. Blur background, compact layout, white text, primary accent for progress bar.
components.token_badge: Neumorphic dark button or glowing border (Tracing Beam style). Use the token accent color (#00FF66) to indicate $SOUND balance.
components.artist_cover: Max 80vh height for hero covers. Linear gradient overlay from black to transparent for readable text.
components.data_testid: ALL interactive elements MUST include testID attribute.

features_architecture: Home / Feed: Featured Artists & Music (Tremayne, Lil Mizzy, Lashellz, etc.)
Music & Beats Browser: Audio player, Trending Sounds, Track Lists
AI Studio: Create beats, production tips, AI generation input
Music Industry News: Articles on AI music, streaming, NFTs
Profile & Gamification: Status updates, Daily streak, Milestones, $SOUND token balance
External Links: YouTube, Apple Music, Spotify embeds/links

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D sound wave, deep void background, cinematic amber glow
Premium DJ mixer with cinematic orange glow

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a React Native Expo application. DO NOT build a web application.
Use standard React Native components (View, Text, Image, ScrollView, FlatList).
Implement React Navigation with 5 bottom tabs: Home, Studio, Explore, News, Profile.
Apply the exact dark mode colors defined in design_system.colors. No light mode.
All tap targets (TouchableOpacity/Pressable) must have a minimum height/width of 44px.
Add 'testID' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
Implement the global floating mini-player above the bottom tab bar.
Integrate the token gamification UI in the profile and as a header badge.
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (e.g., LucideIcons, Ionicons, or Feather).
